adapters.freshness_semantics: source d/t fields are interpreted as exchange-local observed timestamp when present; retrieval timestamp is UTC; freshness is measured observation freshness, not realtime SLA.
adapters.delay_semantics: delay=0 is requested but no official realtime guarantee is asserted; delay_seconds is measured only when source timestamp parses.
adapters.raw_payload_policy: raw payloads may be inspected during bounded probes but product outputs expose normalized envelopes only.
known_limitations: may omit symbols or return stale/closed-session data

adapters.freshness_semantics: TAIEX index value uses the same MIS d/t/tlong timestamp handling as quotes when present.
adapters.delay_semantics: not realtime-guaranteed; expose measured delay or unknown.
adapters.raw_payload_policy: normalized envelope only in product surfaces.
known_limitations: index channel differs from stock symbol channels

adapters.freshness_semantics: TAIFEX CDate/CTime is parsed as Taipei time; front-month TX contract is selected from returned TXF contracts.
adapters.delay_semantics: delay_seconds is retrieval UTC minus parsed source timestamp; source status such as closed-session must be displayed.
adapters.raw_payload_policy: do not expose raw QuoteList in API/MCP/frontend/latest observation.
known_limitations: browser JSON endpoint not a licensed feed contract
front-month derivation depends on display fields

adapters.freshness_semantics: EOD/reference only in this workbench unless a future official live endpoint is contracted and validated.
adapters.delay_semantics: not applicable to Level 2 live observation.
known_limitations: not accepted as intraday live quote source

adapters.freshness_semantics: future candidate pending credentials, terms, and non-trading read-only integration design.
adapters.raw_payload_policy: no credentials or account payloads may be committed.
known_limitations: out of scope for this PR
